HGSS.610.0000:
Ah. You’re on an adventure with
your Pokémon?\f
Well, what’s an adventure without
treasure hunting?\f
Am I right, or am I right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.610.0001:
Good! You understand the true
spirit of adventure.\f
I like that! Take this with you.
HGSS.610.0003:
There are many items lying about
that aren’t obvious.\f
Touch the Dowsing Machine for a while
to see if it makes a high-pitched noise.\f
When it does, you know there is
an item near you.\f
Walking as you use it may make it
easy to find items.\f
Oh yeah--I heard there are items
in Ecruteak’s Burned Tower.
HGSS.610.0004: Oh... To each his own, I suppose...
HGSS.610.0005:
History of Ecruteak\f
Want to read it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.610.0006:
In Ecruteak, there were two towers.
Each tower was the roost of powerful\r
flying Pokémon.\f
But one of the towers burned to
the ground.\f
The two Pokémon haven’t been
seen since...\f
Keep reading? [0200,0000]
HGSS.610.0007:
Ecruteak was also home to three
Pokémon that raced around the town.\f
They were said to have been born of
water, lightning, and fire.\f
But they could not contain their
excessive power.\f
So they say the three ran like the
wind off into the grassland.
